description_long: This is a large, weathered two-story wooden house with a prominent gable roof and an attached side wing. The exterior is painted white but shows significant signs of peeling and aging, giving it a rustic, abandoned appearance. The front features a wide, covered porch with ornate railings and columns, extending across both stories, and a set of steps leading up to the main entrance. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, though some are missing or boarded up, and the roof is covered in aged, mossy shingles. The side wing has a lower roofline and additional porch space, with visible support posts and a partially enclosed area. The house sits on a patch of bare, uneven ground, further emphasizing its aged and possibly neglected state.
description: A large, weathered two-story wooden house with a gable roof, wide porches, and peeling white paint, giving it a rustic, abandoned look.
description_view_0: Front and right side view showing the main gable, two-story porch with ornate railings, and the attached side wing.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the full width of the double porch, central entrance, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Left side view displaying the long side wing, additional windows, and the rear portion of the house.
description_view_3: Rear and left side view showing the back porch, support posts, and the less ornate, more utilitarian rear facade.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, covered double-story porch, decorative railings, and columns
